item.title: 越南对美贸易顺差创历史新高，1月数据显示
item.description: 最新美国官方数据显示，越南1月份对美贸易顺差规模位居首位，超越墨西哥和中国。该国出口额大幅增长，而中国对美直接出口则出现下滑。【原文：Vietnam produced the largest trade surplus with the United States in January, overtaking both Mexico and China, latest official U.S. data shows, as its ​exports rose sharply while Chinese direct shipments to the United States ‌fell.】

item.title: 高盛将3月布伦特原油均价预测上调至每桶100美元以上
item.description: 高盛周五表示，预计布伦特原油3月均价将超过每桶100美元，4月为85美元。由于伊朗战争、中东能源基础设施受损以及霍尔木兹海峡中断，能源价格仍将持续波动。【原文：Goldman Sachs ​expects Brent oil to average over $100 a barrel ‌in March, and $85 in April, it said on Friday, as energy prices remain volatile due to the Iran war and damage ​to Middle East energy infrastructure and disruptions in ​the Strait of Hormuz.】

item.title: 意法半导体计划部署机器人并实施员工再培训以避免工厂关闭
item.description: 意法半导体周四宣布计划，将在其老旧芯片制造工厂实施员工再培训并部署机器人，以避免工厂关闭。这家欧洲半导体巨头正积极应对行业挑战。【原文：STMicroelectronics unveiled ​plans on Thursday to retrain workers and deploy robots in its ‌older chip manufacturing plants, avoiding closures as the European semiconductor giant navigates industry challenges.】

item.title: 独家：ABB董事长称公司正重启并购计划，或将达成"不止一笔"重大交易
item.description: ABB董事长彼得·沃瑟向路透社表示，该公司正加速推进收购计划，并准备推进多项价值数十亿美元的交易。这家瑞士工程集团在经历多年资产剥离后，正寻求加快增长步伐。【原文：ABB is stepping up its acquisition drive and is open to pursuing ​more than one multi-billion dollar transaction, Chairman Peter Voser told Reuters, as the Swiss engineering group looks to speed up ‌growth after years of divestments.】

item.title: 早盘竞价：原油震荡
item.description: 安库尔·班纳吉带您展望欧洲及全球市场今日走势【原文：A look at the day ahead in European and global markets from Ankur Banerjee】

item.title: 大众汽车瞄准中国市场复苏，首款与小鹏汽车合作车型启动量产
item.description: 大众汽车周五表示，已开始量产其与中国电动汽车制造商小鹏汽车联合开发的首次合作车型。这家德国汽车制造商计划今年在中国推出20余款新车型，力图重振中国市场。【原文：Volkswagen said on Friday it has begun mass production of its first model developed jointly with Chinese EV maker Xpeng , as the German ​carmaker targets a comeback in China with more than 20 new models ‌to be launched this year.】

item.title: 苹果在中国应用商店下调佣金费率，此前政府施加压力
item.description: 苹果公司周四宣布，将下调其在中国大陆应用商店收取的佣金费用。在该美国科技巨头第二大市场的监管压力下，此举为中国开发者赢得重大胜利。【原文：Apple said on Thursday it would lower the commission fees collected by the company from its App Store in ​mainland China in a huge win for Chinese developers following apparent pressure from regulators in the U.S. tech giant's second-largest ‌market.】

item.title: 美国银行将英国央行降息预测推迟至六月，因能源价格重燃通胀风险
item.description: 美银全球研究此前预计英国央行将在3月启动降息，现已将预期推迟至6月，称能源价格上涨重燃通胀风险，并使政策前景蒙上阴影。【原文：BofA Global Research, which had expected the Bank of England to begin cutting rates in March, has now pushed its call ​to June, saying rising energy prices have revived inflation ‌risks and clouded the policy outlook.】

item.title: 独家：随着煤价回升，嘉能可重燃重启力拓交易希望
item.description: 三名投资者表示，嘉能可首席执行官加里·纳格尔希望近期煤炭价格的飙升能促使力拓重返谈判桌，再次尝试组建全球最大的矿业公司。本周，这些投资者在澳大利亚与两家公司的领导层进行了会晤。【原文：Glencore CEO Gary Nagle is hoping a recent surge in coal prices will help bring Rio Tinto back to the table for a fresh attempt at creating the world's ​biggest mining company, three investors said, after meeting with leaders of both companies in Australia this week.】

item.title: 为何日本干预日元的门槛如今更高
item.description: 尽管中东冲突正推动日元汇率重返1美元兑160日元这一关键关口——该水平曾被视为日本当局采取干预行动的触发阈值——但日本当前干预外汇市场的空间可能已不如以往。【原文：Japan likely has less scope to intervene in the currency market than it did in the past, even as the Middle East conflict ​pushes the yen back towards the key 160-per-dollar line once considered the trigger threshold for authorities to act.】

item.title: 据《华尔街日报》报道，中国字节跳动公司获得英伟达顶级人工智能芯片的供应权
item.description: 《华尔街日报》周四报道称，TikTok的中国母公司字节跳动正在中国境外组建采用顶级英伟达芯片的计算能力。【原文：TikTok's Chinese parent ByteDance is assembling computing power ​with top Nvidia chips outside China, the ‌Wall Street Journal reported on Thursday.】

item.title: 亚洲股市下跌，伊朗战争使油价维持在100美元附近
item.description: 随着美国和以色列与伊朗战争局势解决的希望迅速消退，油价持续走高，给全球市场蒙上阴影，并加剧了通胀担忧。【原文：Fast-dwindling hopes of a resolution to the U.S. and Israel's war with Iran kept oil prices ​aloft, casting a shadow over global markets and spurring inflation fears.】

item.title: 澳大利亚五分之一的青少年在社交媒体禁令后仍使用TikTok和Snapchat
item.description: 行业数据显示，在澳大利亚禁止社交媒体平台允许未成年人使用两个月后，仍有五分之一的16岁以下青少年仍在使用社交媒体，这引发了人们对其采用的年龄限制方法有效性的质疑。【原文：One-fifth of Australian teenagers under ​16 were still using social media two months after the country banned platforms from allowing ‌minors, industry data showed, raising questions about the effectiveness of age-gating methods they are using.】

item.title: 美国就强迫劳动问题对60个国家展开不公平贸易行为调查
item.description: 美国贸易代表办公室周四晚间表示，已针对60个经济体启动301条款不公平贸易行为调查，理由是这些经济体未能采取行动解决强迫劳动问题。【原文：The U.S. Trade Representative's office said late on Thursday it had begun Section 301 unfair ​trade practices probes of 60 economies in relation to what ‌it called failures to take action on forced labor.】

item.title: 油价下跌，因美国颁发许可证允许各国购买滞留海上30天的俄罗斯原油
item.description: 周五早盘油价下跌，因美国向各国发放了为期30天的许可证，允许其购买目前滞留海上的俄罗斯原油及石油产品，从而缓解了市场对供应的担忧。【原文：Oil prices dropped on Friday morning after the U.S. issued a 30-day license for countries to buy Russian oil and petroleum products currently stranded at sea, easing ​supply concerns.】

item.title: 美元有望实现连续第二周上涨，伊朗战争前景未明
item.description: 美元周五延续涨势，有望自伊朗战争爆发以来实现第二周连涨，因市场动荡使其成为最后的避风港。【原文：The dollar held gains on Friday and was set for its second weekly gain since the beginning of the war ​in Iran as turmoil in markets left it the last safe-haven standing.】

item.title: 本田股价下跌逾5%，这家汽车制造商面临首次年度亏损
item.description: 本田汽车周五早盘在东京股市下跌逾5%，此前该公司警告称，受电动汽车业务高达157亿美元的重组成本拖累，其上市近70年来将首次出现年度亏损。【原文：Shares in ​Honda Motor ‌fell more than ​5% ​in Tokyo on Friday ⁠morning ​after the ​company flagged its first annual ​loss ​in almost 70 ‌years ⁠as a listed company, hit ​by ​up ⁠to $15.7 billion ​in restructuring costs ​at ⁠its electric-vehicle business.】

item.title: 全球电动汽车销量二月再度下滑
item.description: 咨询机构基准矿产情报（BMI）周五发布的数据显示，受中国2020年初新冠疫情暴发以来最大销售额跌幅拖累，全球2月电动汽车注册量下降11%。【原文：Global EV registrations fell 11% in February, dragged by ‌China's largest sales drop since the onset of the COVID-19 pandemic in early 2020, data by consultancy Benchmark Mineral Intelligence (BMI) showed on Friday.】

item.title: 据《纽约时报》报道，Meta推迟推出代号为"牛油果"的新人工智能模型
item.description: 据《纽约时报》周四报道，知情人士透露，Meta公司已将代号为"牛油果"的人工智能模型发布日期从本月推迟至至少五月。【原文：Meta has delayed the release of its artificial intelligence model ​code-named "Avocado" to at least May from ‌this month, the New York Times reported on Thursday, citing three people with knowledge of the matter.】

item.title: 美国允许各国购买滞留海上的俄罗斯石油，期限为30天。
item.description: 美国财政部长斯科特·贝森特表示，为稳定因伊朗战争动荡的全球能源市场，美国已向各国发放为期30天的许可证，允许其购买目前滞留海上的俄罗斯原油及石油产品。【原文：The United States issued a 30-day license for countries to buy Russian oil and petroleum products currently ​stranded at sea in what Treasury Secretary Scott Bessent said was ‌a step to stabilize global energy markets roiled by the war on Iran.】

item.title: 独家：消息人士称，随着先进芯片封装需求激增，BESI引发收购兴趣
item.description: 据三位知情人士透露，BE半导体工业公司近期正面临收购意向，因其芯片封装技术对半导体设备制造商的需求日益关键。【原文：BE Semiconductor Industries has been fielding takeover interest, as demand for its chip-packaging technology has become more critical for semiconductor equipment ​makers, according to three people familiar with the matter.】

item.title: 据彭博社报道，马斯克的X平台将改变欧洲地区的认证系统
item.description: 据彭博社周四援引欧盟委员会发言人报道，在被处以1.2亿欧元罚款后，埃隆·马斯克旗下的社交媒体公司X已同意修改其在欧盟的认证机制。【原文：Elon Musk's social media company X has agreed to change its verification mechanism in the European ​Union following a fine of 120 million euros, ‌Bloomberg News reported on Thursday, citing a European Commission spokesperson.】

item.title: 中国银行加大对科技行业的贷款力度，北京正加速推进人工智能发展
item.description: 银行家表示，中国金融机构计划将更多资金投向科技和创新型企业，以响应北京方面关于在整个经济领域大力采用人工智能并主导新兴产业的承诺。【原文：Chinese lenders plan to steer more money toward technology and innovation-oriented firms, bankers say, responding to Beijing's pledge to aggressively adopt artificial intelligence throughout the economy and dominate emerging sectors.】

item.title: 据彭博社报道，亚马逊计划将Prime会员日活动从七月提前至六月举行。
item.description: 据彭博社周四报道，亚马逊计划将Prime会员日促销活动提前至六月下旬举行，这标志着这项持续十年的重要购物活动罕见地调整了日程安排。【原文：Amazon.com is planning to move its Prime Day sale event ​up to late June, Bloomberg News reported on ‌Thursday, marking a rare shift in calendar for the critical, decade-old shopping event.】

item.title: BuzzFeed警示持续经营风险，股价下跌
item.description: BuzzFeed周四披露了持续经营存疑问题，并表示在评估战略方案期间将不提供2026年业绩预测，导致这家数字媒体公司股价在盘后交易中下跌7.3%。【原文：BuzzFeed on Thursday flagged going concern doubts and said it will not provide a forecast for ​2026 as it evaluates strategic options, sending the digital media company's shares down 7.3% ‌after the bell.】

item.title: 澳洲航空同意支付7400万美元和解金，解决新冠疫情航班积分集体诉讼案
item.description: 澳大利亚澳洲航空公司周五表示，已同意以1.05亿澳元（约合7426万美元）和解一桩集体诉讼，该诉讼涉及新冠疫情期间发放的航班积分，但公司并未承认存在过错。【原文：Australia's Qantas Airways said on Friday it has agreed to settle a class action ​related to flight credits issued during the COVID-19 ‌pandemic for A$105 million ($74.26 million), with no admission of liability.】

item.title: 特朗普要求美联储降息。其对伊朗的战争令投资者押注相反方向。
item.description: 随着伊朗战争局势升级，周四油价飙升之际，美国总统唐纳德·特朗普再次要求美联储主席杰罗姆·鲍威尔降息。【原文：As oil prices surged on Thursday amid an intensifying Iran war, U.S. President Donald Trump again demanded Federal Reserve Chair Jerome Powell ​cut interest rates.】

item.title: 莱纳季度房屋交付量低于预期，房价居高不下
item.description: 莱纳公司周四公布的季度房屋交付量低于华尔街预期，因美国通胀引发的购房负担能力危机抑制了销售。【原文：Lennar on Thursday reported first-quarter home deliveries below Wall Street estimates as an inflation-driven affordability crisis in the U.S. dampens sales.】

item.title: 史赛克公司宣布订单与生产中断，网络攻击发生次日
item.description: 医疗器械制造商史赛克公司周四表示，前一天对其计算机系统发动的网络攻击正导致其业务全面中断，包括处理订单、生产产品以及向客户发货的能力。【原文：Medical device maker Stryker said on Thursday a cyberattack that hit its ​computer systems a day earlier is ‌causing widespread disruption to its business, including its ability to process orders, make products and ​ship them to customers.】

item.title: Ulta Beauty因广告成本上升，年度利润预测低于预期
item.description: Ulta Beauty周四公布的年度利润预期低于华尔街预期，这家化妆品零售商正加大营销力度以提振需求，但消费者支出波动不前，导致其股价在盘后交易中下跌8%。【原文：Ulta Beauty forecast annual profit below Wall Street estimates on Thursday, as the cosmetics retailer ​ramps up marketing efforts to boost demand amid choppy consumer spending, sending ‌its shares down 8% in extended trading.】
